message:
feat(extensions): add sep/delimiter to node:path and rm to node:fs/promises (bd-2ej3)

Add missing exports:
- sep and delimiter constants to node:path
- rm function to node:fs/promises and node:fs.promises

This fixes tmustier-files-widget (needs sep) and extensions using rm.
